----- Forwarded Message ----
From: Nili Priell <nilipr@netvision.net.il>
To: "Moses, Larry" <lmoses@wexner.net>
Sent: Wednesday, February 7, 2007 4:29:52 PM
Subject:

Dear Larry,

Attached is a letter Former Prime Minister Barak wrote to the legal department of your foundation.

Can you please convey it to them?

 

Best regards,

Nili Priell
